title: Hurricane Watching – Within the Architecture of Dead Flowers
author: @salvabikes

entries.body:
vista
atavistic activity
homebody ataraxia
a return to nomadic tendencies
bumping music
out of the rav4
with a view like this

savannah
i finally met you
in good company
square to square
sal^2 walked
everywhere
like floride like europe
like a past life
the air was more breathable
the people more lively
exploring and site seeing
forts and old houses
i felt like pablo
in front of the white house
corpses made of
granite and bronze
swordfish and risotto
coffees and cathedrals

what else do i have
but an ego and four eyes

i was hiking down the mountain
a bee got stuck in my hair
i can feel the buzzing
echoing through my cranium
i am not a flower
just particle physics
skull and bee
free doom
i kept hiking down the mountain

smokescreen
sweat and tears
the taste is bitter
entropic bedroom
a cell within a cell
within a cell
the burden of freedom
organic thoughts
parsed through artificial minds
music doesn’t sound
the same anymore
my body aches
my joints like floor boards
creak under stress
compounding
the forest is burned out
my eyes are itchy
i keep walking
gravel underfoot
hyperextended
spider caught in it’s own web
achilles filled with regret
self consumed with reality
heart eater
is this what the gods envy?
the mirror whispers back
“you can change your mind..”

there’s a bomb in my car
next to a two tone lightsaber
unburnt, yet i am changing
caffeine and creatine
spiraling, like my curls
out of many one, like my curls
different beings, like my curls
yin and yang on my head
spinning
hurricane surf boarder
cody is me
i can feel my teeth again
sharp incisors
canines
the castle is surrounded
there’s a bomb in my car
melted gold chains and rings
under armor
nothing for breakfast

SWAMP
trembling
below freezing
stargazing into a muted sky
in search of a witch coven
lands of a distant people
lands of death and rebirth
snake skin
gators
birds of prey
and lightning
we are water
i learned about genetics here
we are the mutants that won
the game, the only real game
combinations and recombinations
of biological programming
in cyclical reiterative competition
you either build or destroy
where you from? where you come from?

favorite meal
perfected recipe
almost RAW
i like it that way
animal to animal
protein folding
collapsing into muscle fiber
organic sculptures
man eats
man changes
man becomes
something different
a third different thing
i wanna eat you
perpetual genesis
out of flesh and bone
disintegrating and incorporating
the ‘soul-complex’
metamorfose constante
anew
every second
with every breath
i
am
living

shelby
love is animal instinct
thank you for the happiness you bring
i’ve never seen my mom so happy
the tribe expands
interspecies communication developing

psychic surgery
god is a friend
divinizing superstition
wolf teeth
in quantum superposition
genderless
just human
who is you
once known
space cowboy
silver bullets
silver frames
silver teeth
silver surfer
sentence after sentence
ride bikes
with samsara wheels
do you remember the forgetting
hide and seek
with the Void
sunbeams like a barcode
on my skin
same skin that was once sunburnt
same skin that was once freezing
same skin with the tattoos
of ivy and angels and shining stars
replacing neural paths
like the trails in the mountains
our land
with the skeletons
by the creek
the foundation
carving out a new reality
“to plant a garden is to believe in the future”
autoimmune
a self directed violence
selective culling variations
which drift into old paths
cultivating the new ones
until they are walked on
out of muscle memory
sobriety has me feeling like i’m 12 years old again

i feel you
i am here with you
you and i
we are a lot alike
you know
us/we
one in the same
cohesive property
emerged by nature
me and god
god and me
and god
i dissolved into
one
entangled
consciousness
can you hear the music
can you see it
these walls talk
and i
the same language
in time
metamorfose constante
faith keep me living
long enough
to see you again

episode
my blonde hair
la boca del lobo
cut away
perceived identity
genome shotgun sequencing
the smarter the mind the better the traps
a door ajar
twisted and
slipped into
a 5th dimension
scattered
fell asleep there
in between words
reductio ad absurdum
ii Ooo^^^^ o0o—o^(-
(.)o0oxx_^o) 00oooo///)))(.)
^^(-0o^ii^0) ^^ii(.)[[o^(.)+u(-))
//(-Oo— (.)(—-(=
—o(.)+ ii^ +//Oo^(.)—Oooo+iio^
ii //(-+//(-Oo+ ii^+o
^^x_x(.)(—-(= Oo
(.)+Oo// [[o——Ooo_(.)ii^0))))
ii^+o ii+(.)(—-(=
splintering
solo
me and god
playing chess
pieces carved out of each other
at stake
the universe
peopling
the forest
and a splinter
subjective experience
le digo
pienso cortarme el cabello
y me entiende
sin palabras
half blonde hair
meteor shower
a rook
half blonde hair
a knight
falling as tears tend to
a queen
from a head half consumed
by grief
a mirror divided
battlefield
somewhere outside the settlement
at a frontier
the other half in reverie
dancing naked by a self consuming fire
haunting shadows casted
like spells
over the desert sands
somewhere in the west
beyond the blood meridian
those chess pieces materializing and dispersing with each breath
crackling embers in and out of existence
over and over the desert sands
somewhere
in the west
the coyote howls
steals a glance
north towards a constellation
it’ll never reach
head low
bowed in reverence
godspeed words at light speed
that self consuming star
collapsing into itself
until all light disappears

in a walled garden
clone factory
the daily task
rep after rep
is what it takes
to build a life
clone war
star struck
i feel you
a galaxy away
in jars of glass
telescopic lens
i’ll be a satellite
orbiting
until the sun releases
you
a monarch
of light
bound by gravity
coronal mass ejection
lacerating
branding my skin
a radiating kiss
melting
me
away
if not in this lifetime
rep after rep
i’ll clone myself
until it happens

bubbling bubbling bubbling
nature is having sex everywhere
and we all love to see it
mushrooms and flowers
original xxx rated films
human sex been overrated
no romance, stay sedated
flower power
mating ritual
sex sells
what’s the cost? huh?
your sex cells
weak genes
forget it
just keep posting
keep posting
keep posting
composting
SEX!

two ways to solve a problem
coyote howls in the distance
full plastic chrome barrel
9 double M
10 answers, in a magazine
flip the page, money counter
cut down
in the woods
we lit
watching it burn
one eye closed
behind enemy lines
smoke signals
spinal fluid
steak for dinner
iron gives away
the smell of blood
cleanse
freeze warning
hot temper
physical stasis
but the movement
is water
in spirit
animates the flesh
two ways to solve a problem
two minds
two hands
a tumult of eyes
golden embers reflected
in the shadows
out the cave
see the sun
when the time comes
all we can ask is that…
God help us

heavy metal
water bender
hive mind;
spiral colony
webbing
unbinding keys
plural and open source
ultra human
soniiic interference
dissolving a signal
parsec jazz disco tech
two hands two eyes
open a
tab in water
hisses
carbonated split
fizzling static
chemical serpents
slithering liquid
heavy metal
angel wings
palette cleanser
saturation iii instrumentals
unbinding iron
sonic boom

woodcut riddle
carpenter bee
stuck in the middle
vertigo
spinning portal
interweaving
chaos ladders
half steps
wooden creaking
strangling
twitching out of life
twisting
limbs carved
out of a wooden
riddle

dijon
atlanta
tonight
yeah
wao
felt that
spinal
cider croissant smoke
dijon jam session
tabernacle
musiiic is awesome
you can change your mind
i play minecraft music for cows. cows and i become friends. we start a server
we do not have any beef i promise. hello i am coyote

n
memory update
being in nature
makes sense
for a being in nature
subterranean homesick aliens
devoured by mini dinosaur
feathered serpents
mud wrestling truck tires
ford raptors
driving into the rapture
twister and
sound of guns
leather boot
hard of hearing
chrome barrel wielding
spanglish speaking cowboys
war eagle
and a fly on the wall

matrix
statistic
array
number
list
variable
telephone
wire
short
fuse
self
destruct
office
space
game
over

i drink coffee to sit still
no sleep walk
ibear crawl
howling at the drones
fossilized
metabolizing a solar system
heavy metals
chrome plated
chess piece
rookie
still
“too eccentric
for forensics”

yo soy trail runner
plywood
high caliber
screwed
bolt adjusted crown
canine
subaru
trinity
4x4
5th dimension
compacted disc
collision
effervescent everests
human avalanche
gravity bound
i
materialized,
a conqueror

rodeo clown
apparently a crow
socialized
and it worked
dehydrated still

one battle after another
you’re a star
lite spots
sapporo premium glass bottle
wind up bird chronicle
self inflicted romance
game of thrones
self directed telekinesis
world war 2 podcast
for sleep
samsara repeat

praise god
in the wilderness
scary man
pack of dogs
hunting mushrooms
says he doesn’t kill animals
knife
branch breaks
alert
the sound of rain
i accidentally
look up
dizzying
countless
overstimulation of cosmic bodies
interstellar message
are u ready to receive it?
drowning in experience
for the experience of experiencing
is all i can carry
have u felt this series of neurons firing?
have you felt the rain?
the sun?
the words becoming flesh?
and intrepidly vice versa ?
a creature crawling
on the dirt
on the sand
from the dust
on my arm
it flees out of instinct
just another series
a variation of neurons firing
a dreamcatcher neural net
thoughts of you
they’ll go away
one day leviathan
someday subatomic
equally bound
by the forces of nature

micro organismic man of war
biological warfare
artificial thought loops
adding time of death
to my google calendar
i will be busy that day
for now
biological study
anthropology experiments
exercise in freedom

looked at some cells today
thought of ursula k le guin
my mortality
my cellular function within the cellular organism
raging against the machine
learning its intricacies
microwave popcorn
walking
winter is coming
where are thou my faithful sword
i sold you for a wooden plank and a helmet
silver surfer
silver melting
is this the stuff of dreams
from inside the matrix
teeth crushing a cell wall
oxygen deprivation
osmosis of ideas
revolutions in step
and the day the desert turned to glass
i got stuck in traffic on my way to class

walking
one step after the other
20+ miles
i will win this step challenge
peace will be achieved
by any means necessary
one step after the other
i walk this earth
cyclical
chasing a supernova sun
at every event horizon
i walk this earth
and the next and the next and the next

portal
jump in
jump scared
my muscles ache
my joints ache
yet i persist
by faith
only the task
my mind is sharpening
callusing
i will carry the boat
with all u in it
across the raging flood waters
when the wrath of god rains down
even though u identify as a drowning human
i will teach you to breathe

hydrogen atom, singular. i learned this language, these words, just to one day
find out they mean nothing to you

ranting about DNA and +300,000 years of psychological and social
conditioning. sitting around a figurative fire. each soul ablaze. sitting in a
circle- curiosity sparking chain reactions, debate, discussion, philosophizing,
anthropological study. hive mind, the molecular architecture of thought itself.
each mind a node, in an infinite recursive network of consciousness. with
every fiber of my being, this, is what i live for. shapeshifting into every
possible variation. i am just the latest salva isomer covalently bonding to
familiar beings

white magic
voodoo child
if i were a drone
i’d be a bee
buzzing lightyears
away from this
i have no commander
show me your colors
it was meant to be a round table
you have me cornered
triangulated
whats your angle
are you on my side
3 points 3 kids 3 days
the destroyer the creator and the preserver

“nothing is a loss if the goal is to experience”
i am rich

the multitudes converge at a single point
virtual horizon
center of the mirror
scattering
a sun beaming
visceral echoes
a scattering of light
gutteral sound
to you i am
present as one
out of my rib
my experience
one of many
is it a fracture
is it disassociating
i am sourceee
at least
but what does it mean
when i don’t feel like it
bound to a nervous system
a warmth around my rib
primeval spirit datamoshing
mind and matter
soul and source code
atom smashing
splitting into threes in a cascading
echoing mirror
the consistency of water
trifurcated self reflection
splitting branching dispersing
effervescent
why do i feel my spirit dissolving inside my skin

god forms weird shapes
no hands just body
on a path
a crackling
undisturbed
unseen
she crawls on
as if spacetime moves through her and not her through spacetime
body static soul in stereo
“at the end of the day it’s just you and what you think”
i sit alone in a room
four walls and a window
unless god decides to whisper something towards me
dehydrated and my bluetooth headphones are dying over many weeks
what will i be next

ever since watching beauty and the beast on vhs i wanted to feel a room like
this one
at the end of my life, i hope i hear minecraft volume alpha

dispersed being
split apart
bracing together
a thought at a time
network mossy cloud of words
encased in flesh
but i guess im more red than blue now

looked through slashoverpower sketches yesterday
felt like i was rediscovering my own primitive cave paintings
i guess that’s literally what they are
plato cave paintings
to a voice crying in the wilderness
my own anthropology
i support you, now that you are a fossil

american pain
analog mushrooms
synthetic dream
a dispersed being
with a vision of unity
out of many, one
one ring
my brother in samsara
is it time to break the wheel?
i am become dissatisfied
by now i should be able to push these columns, tear the fabric
wrap myself in reality
and proceed to
turn this shit to a pyramid
so we can play minecraft inside
Lan party at the pyramid dm for addy

ok i kinda really like playing magic the gathering
i stay niche

love island
over consumption
american dreaming
weed makes me sleepy
youtube makes me sleepy
instagram makes me sleepy
american dreaming
time of day i sit in the sun
like a lizard
like an ape
recharging
from the great nuclear fusion reactor in the sky
sunbathing at temperatures that make
plastic melt

matcha source
man vs machine vs moss
i am becoming moss
ive taken a liking to lichen
learn what liming is the other day
algae for days algae algae living algae
green
i feel it in my eyes
cones
of green
and the taste of baklava

baby ibex
red panda
satellite hunting star bear
magic the gathering is fun
i miss florida
but the north has its intrigues
my jaw hurts
need to finish coding my website
so i can quit the mainstream
for a little smaller stream somewhere in the wood wide web
small internet
off the grid
school starts soon
stitches unbinding

3 dimensional projected space
in a material world
i can walk through walls
“Did you really think it would kill me? I have walked across the surface of the
sun. I have witnessed events so tiny and so fast, they could hardly be said to
have occurred at all.”
-dr manhattan

WOOOD WiiiDe WEBBB
windows
and door
but i,,
run
through the wall
hii #shotoniphone steve jobs look at this bug

thinking about taoism recently
dreamt of wuji
and
a hurricane
stirring into balance

nothing new under the sun
knife cut prescription
state sanctioned state of consciousness
blurry words
gray areas
point cloud
human constellation
emotional scaffolding
a crumbling pyramid
extraterrestrial unbearably human
who are you and where did you come from
woke up before i got to answer
in my jaw
through my teeth
mind radio rebounding
back to me
dead air on an empty channel
between the lines of the source code
in the jungle
you’ll find me
in bits bytes and pieces
decoded soul condensing on glass
i am the consistency of water
stranded in a tide pool
in a sea of sense
inundated by material
fleshing out

hey beautiful
do you also communicate with the one true god?
what has she told you?
can we compare notes?
ok
i get it
thank you

“i’ve been uninspired since lauryn hill retired, and three stacks man u preachin
to the choir”

this is how i visualize stored information in my brain. weaved together tangled
by spider web
information crystallized
my soul condensed dew drops on the line
bursting
why does it feel like i am a dispersed organism
unraveled
and what prompts me to pull myself together into a sociable human
is it interest
maybe im just hungry
maybe it’s just for beauty

zig zag
left right
cookie dough
research development
milk honey
moon sun
interlinked via cloud
clear skies rainy day
every turn
see you
sal squared
revolution is the word
laughter the song
a reverberating roar
did you know florida means covered in flowers
deep breath meditation
flower and fungi dance along
to an unspoken story
spotted scattered shadows
hopping on hope
as in a mine field
sunlit meadow
but we all know it-right?
ultralight beaming, ear to ear
i photosynthesize
off your smile
no need to move
can we stand right here
look up

“i can feel it in my teeth
a chief without a tribe”
numb
counting reading
the self, shunned
from my roots to my crown
is it mine? shattered into pieces
pulverized jewels became the glimmer
in the eye
the inner eye turned to fear
fear turned to stone
calcified as ribs around
a heart that beats
for the sake of beating
so i can
say it with my chest
say it with my chest more
expectorant words
flushing out ideas
becoming, salivating
hungry for more i,
drool through the veil
dropped out the loop
only me, self supported
free falling through zero gravity
are my eyes still closed?

riiib
this feels like sietch tabr
whale in the desert
landlocked
derivative forces
am i just a domino effect of past selves?

iidentity propaganda
persona propagation
already wind and water
assembly
a void filled with words
and the word became flesh
card carrying
assembled being
hive mind/super organism
my hair curls more, manifold
stemming
stimming from root
single cell to bug to human to god
pipeline
wind and water
planted an idea
a seed in my console

spiraling
particles physics
trace loops
signed cosmos
take root
light and dark
anima and animus
nn a revolver
clicking through ideas
full auto
liquiid
metal
datastream
sometimes it’s good to be a chameleon

tribal loop
the pattern tattooed
on my skin
a sign of time
retracing fluttering
a fire glistening
in my eye
step in and out
repeat
the doorway
rhythmic drumming
ancestral sequence
vines and ethernet cables
interlaced into my braids
branching out
brachiating bacchus
currently streaming consciousness
into a human body

church
symbiosis
stack
meant to live here with 40~ people
pacing
tinkering
building
eating mushrooms
ahhaahah i knew i had seen you before

laundry
lifelong spin cycle
in sync
dry and fold
spacetime
the fabric of reality
undulating and bending
around my hands
stretch and compress
flatten and stack
such delicate a web we weave
in the tangle of our lives
an interplay with gravity

when i die
…
take my body
wrap it up in some canvas or even a lighter fabric and bury me
without a casket
in the jungle
so my molecules my fiber my being will be consumed by every organism
every plant
the fungi
the insects
the animals
the birds
the worms
the cryptobiotic soil
the bacteria
let them consume me
i will go on
living through them
when i die
i want to become a forest
my physical being
all my atoms dispersed throughout
a rhythmic symphony of life
reconfiguring itself into new arrangements
new life
dispersed
my soul will come back
as it tends to do so often
and one day i’ll walk through that forest
and hear
the trees whispering
your
name

snail
the silent art of noticing
a whisper
spiral shape shifter

unfiltered
love
from the source

i asked God to help me feel less alone
then
they appeared
a reminder
a whisper
i hear you
thank you for answering

….fuck…
to be rich is
to eat all the food
+++good conversation
edible art
#heaven
@bar.monolith.atl

oh i got it
that moment
when you realize
oh i got it
x

set for life
my cup runneth over
abundance
to live in true alignment with the natural order
flow
dharma
God’s will
logos (the word)
tao (the way)
vitality surges through my nervous system
i am become human
perpetual re creation
metmorfose constante
samsara
todo: eat grapes, maybe a pomegranate, run through the forest, discuss maybe
even debate with god, smoke, draw, write, share share share
sharing is caring
just left me wondering were everybody went

songs.title: Lifestyle (feat. Young Thug, Rich Homie Quan)

entries.body:
yearning to discuss religion with true practitioners
human software
i yearn for discussion
i yearn for questions
and crave some answers
i’m in flow
approaching the time in my life where i need to go to some of the cradles of
civilization
i yearn to feel devotion dedication faith and a human being surrendering fully
to these religious and philosophical beliefs
what is life when the meaning is exact
i yearn for understanding
i yearn for you human, you human that practices what they preach
reject materialism
educate yourself
become ingobernable
mantra
loop n nn

i love partaking in mainstream overly sexualized capitalist propaganda that
demoralizes the youth and tears at the true n cohesive fabric of love that binds
our reality together just so i have some temporary ego self insisting superficial
material gain.
its not that deep bruh
people are so hot
of course the dominicans won
i had fun actually
the illusion is tempting
anthropological study
do people know the definition of “meme”
“A meme, in its broadest sense, is an idea, behavior, or style that spreads
through imitation within a culture, often carrying symbolic meaning.”
POV: you’re the meme
your soul forever linked to thoughts and ideas fed to you by an algorithm
performative morality
performative people
all of life is but a stage
performative spirituality
performing performing performing
what happened to just being
oh nah he dont know how to act
is this good enough for you?
who’d u vote for nah nah u dont wanna know
but when you do i have a 30-min presentstion with sources and citations
who’s driving this jet ski
we confused a puddle for the ocean
landlocked
needed solid ground for your performance
pause
earthquake
u even know what flow is?
the destroyer makes way for regeneration
my generation needs that

i felt like sharing that today i wrote some of the most coherent descriptions of
liquiidmetal i have ever written
i wrote some stories too
i wrote some code for my website
i wrote to my love
i wrote to myself
i wrote to my friends
i still shy away from calling myself a writer
i still think labels and individualism are overvalued
i think the same about identity
i am insecure about how every sentence started with i
i am coping with it by claiming it’s an artistic choice
i am subject to my nervous system and gut biome
i am becoming
i have been
iphone addicted
i must be stimulated or else
i feel like this is an extension of me
i think im done writing for now
i am a writer after all
i know that because i procrastinate and suffer for it
i used think that and believed it
i am grown enough to know that it’s all bullshit
i know
i know
i know
i …
i’m done

3 words
33 fortunes and reminders
333 ways of saying thank you
3333 places to hangout
33333 combinations of xs and os
333333 raindrops on your skin
3333333 things to share
33333333 food to eat
333333333poems and notes
3333333333 <3 n
only you can pick them
you are the oracle
oh my god “there is no spoon”
but we saw it
the oracle said there’s no spoon
we are real right? maybe not of this dimension but real at the least

passion fruit
orange tangerine
sunburned
thunderstorm
sunburned
thunderstorm

outlaw blues
florida water
“-‘s in the basement mixing up the medicine
while im on the pavement thinkin about the government”
living like there’s a price on my head
judge at the blood meridian
he ran howling, switch in hand,
with a witch
and a jar
into the jungle
never to be seen
an apparition summoned by musiiic
a voice praising god in the wilderness
encrypted messages via satellite
oracle
intercepting signal from the cosmos
i got wifi in the jungle
the revving of motocross engines
howling

it’s me
sssalvaaa
weekly witch watching
across state lines
no case
close to the metal
halt and catch fire
pretty at peace
almost relaxed
eye of the storm
i
sad yet much happier
lesser than
yet greater
none
the less
sssalvaaa
can i pet dat dawg nnnnnn

non binary floridaman
soul superposition interface
pearl necklace swamp beast
from a strange brew
even stranger breed
twice born
sound wave creature
the shape of music
digital deity
chant down
babylon
mind radiio
what else to do
www
strange brew
.com munity
a few and many more
failed to materialize
failed successfully
that which can’t be seen is eternal
somewhere outside time
hanging out with a coyote
cooking a strange brew
discussing emerging consciousness
you get what i mean?
that’s florida to me
and an orange sunburned thunderstorm

a little mighty roar
look at me
count the seconds
fetal position
lightning storm
consult the jar
pick again
the future is mine
a little mighty roar
feel the wind
together we were,
rolling thunder

happy birthday
mi brujiita favorita
island beach
jungle or swamp
you get a star
fortune teller
sun light bender
neutron star
at the center
moonlit whisperer
mind radiio
telepathic
tribe of two
so good to see you
and good to be seen
spoon constellation
flowers flowers flowers
like your tattoos

this feels just like conquering the roman republic and becoming the first
emperor in perpetuity. we ate
dr k taught me “the feeling of needing to pee for hours and then you finally
pee, the relief that joy you feel through your body. in your brain that feels
exactly the same whether you have a billion dollars in the bank or 3.” life is a
feeling process nnnnape ape ape

why is this appealing
what made me want to take a picture
is it its singular function
a machine with one purpose
built to serve?
order? dedication or the comfort there is in being one thing at a time
the earth will reclaim these metals
and those atoms will be repurposed rearranged
and maybe in all the inbetween moments part of that rearrangement energy
itself progressing this change moving itself through space time maybe
just maybe in those in between moments
energy is felt as
the joy of being nothing
while trying to be everything

metal face
baby gangsta grillz
i should smile more
everything is a psyop
“metamorfose constante” !!!!!
custom made liquiidmetal

gotta think of a word
for when an idea is in your head so long
developing in your subconscious
it starts to gradually seep into your reality
a perpetual present deja vu
the idea manifesting infecting growing
into this dimension
i knew i had seen you before

felt at home in here
wanna build a castle
with a nuclear bunker underneath it
vertical farms silo
the ark
sculpture garden living statues overgrown with moss and plants and fungi
outside gym
conversation pits
roaming animals: sheep turtles peacocks
and a dog named dim
and a cat named quanta
stimming through the halls
echolalia, and a cat named echo
library
indoor garden glass roof sun room

24 hours at la guardia
solo
spartan mode
like my dad taught me
indifference
life advice from a ghost
new favorite song
“i’m brrroadd yes i’m broad
broader than broadway”

in 400 years when they find these pictures and writing in my files, maybe then
it’ll make sense to the collective conscious. these messages can only be
understood in retrospect. still haven’t worked that out. past the 157th make
sure you look back for me. some will make more sense build out the rest. PCR
my lists and poems. amplify the nature of these words. my sentence is to be
limited by them, to choke on every syllable as i spit truth. if you’re reading
them you’re probably a lot like me. let me live through you as you read me.
move it forward, even if you stumble. remember the mantra. stay in the loop.
spiral upward n

body made of gold
flesh of my flesh
wealth is of the mind
divinely composed
you can’t serve two masters equally
at the edge of the world
which one are you saving

cherry picked by god
now u cherry pick the mantra
degrading the adhesive
which binds us
human as product
price on your head
speculative economy
soul debt
value diluted for the
sake of playing the game
same game we protest
american pain
human sacrifice
i am FREE
YOU CANT BUY THIS PERSON
THANK YOU GOD
alone in a loop
y’all at the auction
assuming the for sale sign
will come off your head
they even put you on clearance
you know you can buy gucci at ross?
this means nothing
but who even am i
my genes are pre currency
soul value can’t be reduced to a financial system
i am free
those cherries i picked in vivero ii were always bittersweet, i was 6 n

ancient ancestral ritual
of the 2 am NY pizza
looping
corporate communitas
“friendship is lowkey the sunshine of my life”
we really walked like 10 miles
we really saw the sun n
even winked back at us
#accidentalrenaissance

griidlock
in superposition
all 5 boroughs simultaneously
glitching

inverted hierarchy
blind leading the blind
why has it become unbearable to see everything
ohhhhhh no vision
i still exist the electric dreams of androids
a ghost in the machiine
perpetual present

liquiidmetal
tabula rasa
i am
quantum leaping through
each new version
learn build express destroy
build destroy loop
mantra mantra mantra
thank God for pushing US this far
primus

sunset to sunrise
in the city that never sleeps
i might have taken a nap

gonna max out my XP
in this one
:: biologist
philosopher
nomad
artist
aspiring cult leader
athlete
linguist
anthropologist
sapiens
but to me it just feels like existing
what else are we meant to do but pursue curiosity and love

language as the programming device for culture and propagation of ideas
good rhetoric hacks your operating system
these words processed by your prefrontal cortex
activating motor function
there's life in words
quotes are apps
simon says
keep moving forward
and you do

lord we know what we are yet we know not what we may be... assume a virtue
if you have none HOE
-shakes
"i contain multitudes"
and the next and the next next next

today i saw myself in the future returning to see these 4,000 year old school
notes
"i was here"
traces of past lives
i see you
and am here with you

and every now and then
we catch an attempted glimpse
of the heavens
in the perpetual present
we are all unbearably renaissance
what's heaven to you?

all seeing lab grown "gods"
watching our every step
never-ending beat of stone and metal
shaped humanity into data structures
"we are all cam girls in a mass surveillance state" - idk

random gallery drop in
this is nice @philip_geraldo

divine feminine
day well spent
lady wisdom

mozart in the jungle
higher rpm
increased complexity makes the loop even stronger
if not inevitable
everything flows
like water cutting through those canyons in arizona
people cut through the arteries of the city
lifeline next stop 157th st

on the move (again)
back to the spawn point
vicks mints
perpetual motion machine
i just want to ask you questions
chemically rearranging
until every version of me exists

sssaudade
i understand it now
like a dream
but not really
like nostalgia
i am empty
but more like
untranslatable
it had to be experienced
is this learning?
community had been
only a memory to me
i am seen
in the perpetual present
NOW

back in the day
self isolation
stay in the loop
mantra
n
my halo (headphones) melted on the charger
halo bones (airpods) not as good
bike frame still bent
i do small talk now
spiraling upwards
is this growth?

feline nature
apex predator
non binary identity
archetypical phoebism

florida
with a coyote named dim, short for 5th dimension
they only speak helix
i think i need to finish writing liquiid metal

Anthropocene: the age of humans

holding the grounds together

the perpetual present

eternal ever changing

today i learned
human genome is maleable

learn adapt

within the super-organism

entries.body:
all american
exodus
my genes immigrated here
from all over the world
12,000 + years ago
thought travelled too
astral plane
ancestral pain
my genome n is built to move
stumble forward
high agency
curiosity
i am the i am
"who you think you are, i am"
escape the tyrannical ego
emancipated and searching
out to the desert
where God lives

bleached bits
starfire
no witness
i can see you n me better
weekly witch watching ritual
calavera candelabra
infused with sound
fun to play with
if you want
did you know we would meet?
i see you better now
broken words turned into letters now
telepathy is seismic under this field of dreams
read that once
speak of it twice
a silent fluency that travels far
and dances like how light curves around a collapsed star
iron blossoms into a virtual wave
lost in a blackhole
extemporaneous creatures
on the sun walk of breathe
light wielding sky crossing
157th life activity
stop acting like it's your first
that doesn't work anymore
i can see me better now
and i like it so much more

i thought a soul was hand wash only
